warnings: ABAP session variables like $session.user_timezone have no direct SQL equivalent
ABAP-specific functions like unit_conversion, dats_days_between, utcl_current have no direct SQL equivalent
Parameters syntax $parameters.p_smax translated to :p_smax bind variable
Some ABAP built-in functions like div(), concat_with_space() may not exist in Snowflake
assumptions: Parameters are passed as bind variables using :parameter_name syntax
ABAP session variables mapped to SQL equivalents where possible
ABAP-specific date/time functions replaced with standard SQL DATEDIFF/DATEADD
ABAP typed literals converted to standard SQL literals
Projection references resolved to column aliases within same SELECT
conversion_notes: Converted ABAP CDS DEFINE VIEW to SQL CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW
Translated ABAP CASE expressions to SQL CASE WHEN...THEN...ELSE...END
Converted ABAP cast expressions to SQL CAST functions
Mapped ABAP built-in functions to closest SQL equivalents
